title: carex goodenowii subsp. stolonifera
intro: Carex goodenowii subsp. stolonifera, also known as Good's sedge or Stoloniferous sedge, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Carex goodenowii subsp. stolonifera is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it easy to incorporate into herbal remedies for various health issues.
